nodes.name: project.pbxproj
nodes.summary: Xcode project definition describing build phases, targets, file references, and build settings for the iOS app.

nodes.name: LICWMorsebrowser.xcscheme
nodes.summary: Shared Xcode scheme defining build, run, test, and archive actions for the LICWMorsebrowser iOS target.

nodes.name: contents.xcworkspacedata
nodes.summary: Xcode workspace manifest referencing the app project and the CocoaPods Pods project.

nodes.name: AppDelegate.swift
nodes.summary: iOS application entry point bootstrapping the Expo/React Native runtime and handling deep links and universal links via RCTLinkingManager.
nodes.languageNotes: Swift ExpoAppDelegate subclass starting React Native through ExpoReactNativeFactory and overriding URL/userActivity handlers for Linking support.

nodes.name: AppDelegate
nodes.summary: Main iOS app delegate that starts React Native with module 'main' and forwards open-URL and continue-userActivity calls to RCTLinkingManager for deep linking.

nodes.name: ReactNativeDelegate
nodes.summary: Expo React Native factory delegate resolving the JS bundle URL, using the metro dev bundle in DEBUG and the embedded main.jsbundle in release.

nodes.name: Contents.json
nodes.summary: Asset catalog manifest mapping app icon image variants to their iOS size and scale slots.

nodes.name: Contents.json
nodes.summary: Top-level asset catalog manifest declaring the asset author metadata for the iOS image set.

nodes.name: Info.plist
nodes.summary: iOS app property list declaring bundle identifiers, URL schemes, UIBackgroundModes for background audio, and other runtime configuration.
nodes.languageNotes: Declares UIBackgroundModes:audio required for Morse playback through screen lock per project hard requirements.

nodes.name: LICWMorsebrowser-Bridging-Header.h
nodes.summary: Objective-C bridging header exposing native headers to the Swift app target.

nodes.name: LICWMorsebrowser.entitlements
nodes.summary: iOS entitlements file declaring app capabilities such as associated domains for universal links.

nodes.name: PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy
nodes.summary: Apple privacy manifest declaring required-reason API usage and data collection practices for App Store review.

nodes.name: SplashScreen.storyboard
nodes.summary: Interface Builder storyboard defining the iOS launch/splash screen shown during app startup.

nodes.name: Expo.plist
nodes.summary: Expo-specific property list configuring update URLs and runtime settings for the iOS build.

nodes.name: Podfile
nodes.summary: CocoaPods dependency manifest for the iOS app, configuring Expo autolinking and React Native pods plus post-install build settings.

nodes.name: Podfile.properties.json
nodes.summary: JSON properties consumed by the Podfile to toggle Expo build options such as Hermes and new architecture.

nodes.name: metro.config.js
nodes.summary: Metro bundler configuration for the mobile app, extending the Expo defaults to resolve monorepo workspace packages from the repo root.

nodes.name: @react-native+gradle-plugin+0.85.3.patch
nodes.summary: patch-package diff modifying the React Native Gradle plugin to fix a build issue in version 0.85.3.

nodes.name: generate-asset-manifests.mjs
nodes.summary: Build script that recursively lists bundled lesson/preset/word-file assets and writes hashed manifest JSON for the mobile app to load at runtime.

nodes.name: listFilesRecursive
nodes.summary: Recursively walks a directory tree and returns all contained file paths for manifest generation.

nodes.name: writeManifest
nodes.summary: Writes an asset manifest JSON file describing the bundled assets and their content hashes.

nodes.name: hashFiles
nodes.summary: Computes a content hash over a set of files to support cache invalidation of generated manifests.

nodes.name: sync-presets.mjs
nodes.summary: Build script copying shared preset JSON files into the mobile app's bundled assets directory.

nodes.name: copyDir
nodes.summary: Recursively copies a directory of preset files into the mobile app's asset destination.

nodes.name: sync-wordfiles.mjs
nodes.summary: Build script resolving and copying shared word-list files into the mobile app's bundled assets.

nodes.name: resolveSource
nodes.summary: Resolves the source directory for word files, preferring a local dev repo when available.

nodes.name: wordify.json
nodes.summary: Punctuation-to-word mapping config used by the mobile app to spell out characters for text-to-speech of Morse content.

nodes.name: _redirects
nodes.summary: Static-host redirect rules (Netlify/Cloudflare style) enabling SPA fallback routing for the web app.

nodes.name: wordify.json
nodes.summary: Punctuation-to-word mapping config used by the web app to spell out characters for text-to-speech of Morse content.

nodes.name: playbackTiming.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit test verifying playback timing helper behavior, specifically whether the trailing word space should be trimmed.

nodes.name: shouldTrimLastWordSpace
nodes.summary: Test helper determining whether the final inter-word space should be trimmed from a Morse playback sequence.

nodes.name: dark-mode.css
nodes.summary: Dark-mode theme stylesheet overriding Bootstrap and app colors for the web app's dark appearance.

nodes.name: morsebrowser.css
nodes.summary: Primary application stylesheet for the web app, styling the Morse browser layout, accordions, and playback controls to match the upstream fork.
